FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Context for certification management access control, will also be used for multi-tenancy

FIELD.NAME: fullname
FIELD.COMMENT: Human readable name of the certification, does not have to be unique

FIELD.NAME: idnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: Unique identifier of a certification, multilang definitely not supported

FIELD.NAME: description
FIELD.COMMENT: Certification description text

FIELD.NAME: presentationjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Visual presentation of certification, such as image files

FIELD.NAME: publicaccess
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means visible to everyone, 0 means use cohorts for visibility

FIELD.NAME: archived
FIELD.COMMENT: Archived certifications are hidden, non-mutable and mostly ignored, certification must be archived before deletion

FIELD.NAME: programid1
FIELD.COMMENT: Program for initial certification

FIELD.NAME: programid2
FIELD.COMMENT: Program for recertification, programid1 used if not set

FIELD.NAME: templateid
FIELD.COMMENT: Template for certification and recertification certificate

FIELD.NAME: recertify
FIELD.COMMENT: NULL means no automatic recertification, number is seconds before the end of last period when the next recertification window opens

FIELD.NAME: periodsjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Various setting for creation of certification periods - length, window size, dates logic, reset type, etc.

INDEX.NAME: idnumber
INDEX.COMMENT: Enforce unique idnumber for all certifications

INDEX.NAME: templateid
INDEX.COMMENT: Soft reference to tool_certificate_templates.id, one template can be used in multiple certifications

TABLE.NAME: tool_mucertify_cohort
TABLE.COMMENT: Members of these cohorts may browse non-public certifications before assignment

TABLE.NAME: tool_mucertify_source
TABLE.COMMENT: Certification assignment sources representing different means of user assignment

FIELD.NAME: type
FIELD.COMMENT: Type of assignment - manual, self, cohort, etc.

FIELD.NAME: datajson
FIELD.COMMENT: General assignment source settings

TABLE.NAME: tool_mucertify_src_cohort
TABLE.COMMENT: General certification source cohorts list - for things like automatic assignment

TABLE.NAME: tool_mucertify_request
TABLE.COMMENT: List of people waiting for assignment to certifications, entry is deleted after assignment

FIELD.NAME: datajson
FIELD.COMMENT: Request details created by source

FIELD.NAME: timerejected
FIELD.COMMENT: Rejected request blocks retry, delete rejected record if retry allowed

INDEX.NAME: sourceid-userid
INDEX.COMMENT: Only one request for assignment of user per source, delete rejection if they are allowed to retry

FIELD.NAME: sourceid
FIELD.COMMENT: Means of user assignment

FIELD.NAME: sourcedatajson
FIELD.COMMENT: Extra assignment data belonging to source, person who allocated manually, etc.

FIELD.NAME: archived
FIELD.COMMENT: All program allocations are suspended when user assignment is archived and certification is frozen

FIELD.NAME: timecertifiedtemp
FIELD.COMMENT: Temporary certification until given date

FIELD.NAME: evidencejson
FIELD.COMMENT: Alternative certification evidence details for temporary certification

FIELD.NAME: timecertifiedfrom
FIELD.COMMENT: Cached value of first certification start

FIELD.NAME: timecertifieduntil
FIELD.COMMENT: Cached value of latest certification end - uses TIMESTAMP_FOREVER

INDEX.NAME: certificationid-userid
INDEX.COMMENT: Maximum one assignment of user per certification

TABLE.NAME: tool_mucertify_period
TABLE.COMMENT: Periods representing certification validity date ranges - periods are treated as archived if assignment record is missing

FIELD.NAME: programid
FIELD.COMMENT: Program to complete in order to certify, NULL means unknown

FIELD.NAME: timewindowstart
FIELD.COMMENT: Specifies program allocation start date

FIELD.NAME: timewindowdue
FIELD.COMMENT: Specifies program allocation due date

FIELD.NAME: timewindowend
FIELD.COMMENT: Specifies program allocation end date

FIELD.NAME: allocationid
FIELD.COMMENT: Program allocation id, NULL means not yet allocated, value is kept after unallocation, 0 means error

FIELD.NAME: timecertified
FIELD.COMMENT: Usually matches program completion date, cen be overridden with admin capability

FIELD.NAME: timefrom
FIELD.COMMENT: Start date of validity - required when timecertified set

FIELD.NAME: timeuntil
FIELD.COMMENT: End date of validity - required when timecertified set

FIELD.NAME: timerevoked
FIELD.COMMENT: Date means user is not certified even if timecertified present, required to be set before deleting period

FIELD.NAME: evidencejson
FIELD.COMMENT: Alternative certification evidence or revoking details

FIELD.NAME: first
FIELD.COMMENT: Calculated flag - 1 means this is the initial certification - non-revoked period with earliest window start, 0 means this is recertification

FIELD.NAME: recertifiable
FIELD.COMMENT: Is this a candidate for recertification? value 1 or 0 - only the last non-revoked period

FIELD.NAME: certificateissueid
FIELD.COMMENT: Certificate id issued via tool_certificate
